info.name: ClickAndMunch API
info.description:
Full API collection for the ClickAndMunch microservices backend.

**Gateway:** http://localhost:8080

**Services:**
| Service | Port | Gateway Path |
|---------|------|--------------|
| AuthService | 8081 | /auth/** |
| RestaurantService | 8082 | /restaurant/** |
| GeoService | 8083 | (internal only) |
| MenuService | 8084 | /menu/** |
| OrderService | 8085 | /order/** |
| ReservationService | 8086 | /reservation/** |
| NotificationService | 8087 | /notification/** |
| RatingService | 8088 | /rating/** |
| CheckoutService | 8089 | /checkout/** |

**Flow:**
1. Register a user
2. Login to get a JWT token (auto-saved to `token` variable)
3. Use protected Restaurant, Menu, Order, Reservation, Checkout, Rating, and Notification endpoints

**Auth routes** are public. All other routes require a Bearer token.

request.description: Register a new user. Roles: CUSTOMER, OWNER
Register a restaurant owner account
Login and get a JWT token. The token is automatically saved to the `token` collection variable.
Get user info by user ID. Returns username and role.
Request a password reset email. NOTE: This endpoint is called directly on AuthService (port 8081) because the controller path doesn't follow the /api prefix convention.
Confirm a password reset with the token received via email. NOTE: Direct call to AuthService (port 8081).
Create a new restaurant. Requires OWNER role.
Get a restaurant by its ID
Get all restaurants owned by a specific user
Search for restaurants near a given location
Get full restaurant details including address, coordinates, and menu categories with items
Create a complete menu with categories and items in one request. Categories: ENTRADA, PLATO, POSTRE, BEBIDA, ENSALADA, ADICIONAL
Create a single menu category. Values: ENTRADA, PLATO, POSTRE, BEBIDA, ENSALADA, ADICIONAL
Get a menu category by its MongoDB ObjectId
Update a menu category
Delete a menu category by ID
Add a new item to a menu category
Get a menu item by its MongoDB ObjectId
Update a menu item
Delete a menu item by ID
Get all menu categories for a restaurant
Get all menu items for a restaurant (flat list)
Delete the entire menu for a restaurant

item.name: Order
item.description: Order management endpoints (JWT required). Statuses: Preparing, Ready, Served, Delivered, Cancelled. Channels: Reservation, InPerson.

request.description: Create a new order. Channel: InPerson or Reservation.
Get all orders sorted by date descending
Get a single order by ID, including its items
Get all orders for a specific restaurant
Filter orders by restaurant and status. Statuses: Preparing, Ready, Served, Delivered, Cancelled
Get all orders for a specific customer
Update order notes and ETA
Change order status. Values: Preparing, Ready, Served, Delivered, Cancelled
Delete an order and all its items

item.name: Reservation
item.description: Reservation management endpoints (JWT required). Statuses: Pendiente, Confirmada, Cancelada, Completada.

request.description: Create a new reservation. Date must be today or in the future.
Get all reservations sorted by date descending
Get a single reservation by ID
Get all reservations for a specific restaurant
Get all reservations for a specific customer
Filter reservations by status. Values: Pendiente, Confirmada, Cancelada, Completada
Get all reservations for a restaurant on a specific date (ISO format: YYYY-MM-DD)
Change reservation status. Values: Pendiente, Confirmada, Cancelada, Completada
Associate an existing order with this reservation
Delete a reservation by ID

item.name: Checkout
item.description: Checkout / Saga Orchestrator (JWT required). Validates cart, creates an order in OrderService, and optionally links it to a reservation.

request.description: Process a full checkout. Creates an order via OrderService. If reservationId is provided, links the order to the reservation.
Checkout with an existing reservation. The order will be automatically linked to the reservation.

item.name: GeoService (Direct)
item.description: GeoService is internal-only (not exposed through gateway). Call directly on port 8083.

request.description: Create a new geo location. Types: RESTAURANT, BAR, CUSTOMER. Note: This is typically called internally by RestaurantService.
Search for locations near a given coordinate within a radius
Get all stored geo locations

body.raw:
{
  "userId": 1,
  "restaurantId": 1001,
  "type": "ORDER",
  "title": "Order Ready",
  "message": "Your order #1 is ready for pickup",
  "orderId": 1
}
